title: UBase64Enc
text: UBase64Enc Encode a null terminated string in Base64 format. extern long UBase64Enc(const unsigned char * In , unsigned char * Out , long OutMaxLen ); Parameters Parameter Direction Description In IN UTF8 string that is to be encoded Out OUT Base64 encoded result OutMaxLen IN Maximum number of bytes that can be written to Out Return Values Value Meaning < 0 Not all characters have been encoded. ( -1 x ReturnValue ) have been encoded. 0 Failed to encode in base64 > 0 All characters have been encoded. The value is the actual length of the output data. Use Library uenc Description This function is useful for creating security drivers that need to encode and decode data. Table 1. Related learning videos Title link Using $encode to convert to base64 or hex Related Links UBase64Dec Decode a null terminated Base64 encoded string to string. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
